query:
INSERT INTO order_items (orderId, productId, productName, productImage, price, quantity, subtotal, createdAt)
SELECT 4, id, name, imageUrl, '1.00', 1, '1.00', NOW()
FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%連線%'
LIMIT 1;

-- 確認插入成功
SELECT oi.orderId, oi.productName, oi.price, o.orderNumber 
FROM order_items oi 
JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.orderId 
WHERE oi.orderId = 4;
